# Synergy UI

> A React component library distributed via the shadcn CLI registry.

## Install

Add any component to your project with:

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add "https://synergy-shock.github.io/ui/r" synergy/<component-name>
```

## Components

- **Orb** (`synergy/orb`): An animated orb with audio reactivity, custom colors, and agent state visualization.
- **Background** (`synergy/background`): An animated background component that smoothly blends a 4-color gradient.
- **Logo** (`synergy/logo`): The Synergy wordmark logo.
- **Icon** (`synergy/icon`): The Synergy icon mark.

## Links

- [Documentation](https://synergy-shock.github.io/ui)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/synergy-shock/ui)
